languages.text: "Как ты смеешь..." {n}На скулах Ларии багровеют ярко-алые пятна. Она шумно дышит, сжимая кулаки.{/n} "Как вы все смеете!" {n}Лария затравленно озирается, но ее рука, лежащая на рукояти болт-пистолета, остается недвижимой.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я... подвела вас".

traits.locale_text: "Как ты смеешь..." {n}На скулах Ларии багровеют ярко-алые пятна. Она шумно дышит, сжимая кулаки.{/n} "Как вы все смеете!" {n}Лария затравленно озирается, но ее рука, лежащая на рукояти болт-пистолета, остается недвижимой.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я... подвела вас".
traits.speaker: LariaVoigtvir

languages.text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."
languages.original_text: "Как ты смеешь..." {n}На скулах Ларии багровеют ярко-алые пятна. Она шумно дышит, сжимая кулаки.{/n} "Как вы все смеете!" {n}Лария затравленно озирается, но ее рука, лежащая на рукояти болт-пистолета, остается недвижимой.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, я... подвела вас".

She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

"How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

languages.text: “你们竟敢……”{n}鲜红的血色浮现在菈丽雅的脸颊上，她呼吸急促，双拳紧握。{/n}“你们这些人，竟敢如此！”{n}她环顾四周，神色如困兽般警惕，但按在爆矢手枪上的手依旧纹丝未动。{/n}“大人，我……辜负了您。”
languages.original_text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

traits.locale_text: “你们竟敢……”{n}鲜红的血色浮现在菈丽雅的脸颊上，她呼吸急促，双拳紧握。{/n}“你们这些人，竟敢如此！”{n}她环顾四周，神色如困兽般警惕，但按在爆矢手枪上的手依旧纹丝未动。{/n}“大人，我……辜负了您。”

languages.text: « Comment osez-vous... » {n}Un rouge écarlate monte aux joues de Laria. Sa respiration est bruyante et ses poings serrés.{/n} « Comment osez-vous, tous autant que vous êtes ?! » {n}Laria regarde tout autour d'elle, comme prise au piège, mais la main qu'elle a posée sur la crosse de son pistolet bolter ne bouge pas.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie... J'ai échoué. »
languages.original_text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

traits.locale_text: « Comment osez-vous... » {n}Un rouge écarlate monte aux joues de Laria. Sa respiration est bruyante et ses poings serrés.{/n} « Comment osez-vous, tous autant que vous êtes ?! » {n}Laria regarde tout autour d'elle, comme prise au piège, mais la main qu'elle a posée sur la crosse de son pistolet bolter ne bouge pas.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie... J'ai échoué. »

languages.text: «¿Cómo se atreven...?». {n}Unos puntos de color escarlata aparecen en las mejillas de Laria. Respira profundamente, apretando los puños.{/n} «¡¿Cómo se atreven todos?!». {n}Laria mira a su alrededor, con cara atormentada, pero no mueve la mano apoyada en la empuñadura de su pistola bólter.{/n} «Milord... le he fallado».
languages.original_text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

traits.locale_text: «¿Cómo se atreven...?». {n}Unos puntos de color escarlata aparecen en las mejillas de Laria. Respira profundamente, apretando los puños.{/n} «¡¿Cómo se atreven todos?!». {n}Laria mira a su alrededor, con cara atormentada, pero no mueve la mano apoyada en la empuñadura de su pistola bólter.{/n} «Milord... le he fallado».

languages.text: "Ne cüretle..." {n}Laria'nın yanaklarında parlak kızıl lekeler beliriyor. Ağır ağır nefes alıyor, yumruklarını sıkıyor.{/n} "Buradaki herkesteki bu ne cüret!" {n}Laria, avlanıyormuş gibi bir bakışla etrafına bakınıyor. Ancak bulon tabancasının kabzasında duran eli, olduğu yerde kalıyor.{/n} "Lord Hazretleri, ben... Sizi hayal kırıklığına uğrattım."
languages.original_text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

traits.locale_text: "Ne cüretle..." {n}Laria'nın yanaklarında parlak kızıl lekeler beliriyor. Ağır ağır nefes alıyor, yumruklarını sıkıyor.{/n} "Buradaki herkesteki bu ne cüret!" {n}Laria, avlanıyormuş gibi bir bakışla etrafına bakınıyor. Ancak bulon tabancasının kabzasında duran eli, olduğu yerde kalıyor.{/n} "Lord Hazretleri, ben... Sizi hayal kırıklığına uğrattım."

languages.text: "Wie könnt Ihr es wagen ..." {n}Auf Larias Wangen bilden sich rote Flecken. Sie atmet schwer und ballt ihre Fäuste.{/n} "Wie könnt Ihr es alle wagen!" {n}Laria sieht sich mit gehetztem Blick um, nimmt ihre Hand aber nicht vom Griff ihrer Boltpistole.{/n} "Eure Lordschaft, ich ... habe Euch enttäuscht."
languages.original_text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."

traits.locale_text: "Wie könnt Ihr es wagen ..." {n}Auf Larias Wangen bilden sich rote Flecken. Sie atmet schwer und ballt ihre Fäuste.{/n} "Wie könnt Ihr es alle wagen!" {n}Laria sieht sich mit gehetztem Blick um, nimmt ihre Hand aber nicht vom Griff ihrer Boltpistole.{/n} "Eure Lordschaft, ich ... habe Euch enttäuscht."

languages.text: 「どうしたんだ…」{n}リアラの頬は鮮やかな赤色に染まり、息を荒くしながら拳を握りしめた。{/n} 「みんな、どうしたんだ！」{n}リアラは周囲を見回し、怯えた表情を見せるが、ボルトピストルの柄に置かれた手は動かない。{/n} 「お方、私は…お方にお仕えできませんでした。」
languages.original_text: "How dare you..." {n}Spots of bright scarlet appear high on Laria's cheeks. She breathes heavily, clenching her fists.{/n} "How dare you all!" {n}Laria glances around with a hunted look, but the hand resting on the hilt of her bolt pistol remains where it is.{/n} "Your Lordship, I... have failed you."
